headline: Micron Joins S&P 100 As AI DRAM Launch Shapes Valuation Debate
summary: Micron Technology (NasdaqGS:MU) has been added to the S&P 100 index, underscoring its growing weight among large US companies. The company has started shipping a 256GB low power DRAM module for AI data centers, described as the highest capacity in the industry. Both developments tie Micron more closely to AI infrastructure demand and large cap index investor flows. Micron enters this news cycle with its shares at $370.3 and a very large 1 year return, while the 3 year gain is about 6x. The...

headline: This Week's Market Wrap: Energy, Defense Stocks Take The Lead As Oil Prices Spike Higher
summary: Crude oil futures rose dramatically throughout the week, climbing from roughly $71 per barrel at the start of the week to above $90 by Friday. Read more here.
